overview: Lindgren Functional Medicine specializes in personalized testosterone replacement therapy using an integrative approach that combines advanced diagnostic testing with lifestyle modifications and nutritional support. Dr. Kristen Lindgren and her team create customized treatment plans to address hormonal imbalances.
highlights: Multiple delivery methods (injections, topical creams, pellets)
targetAudience: Men and women with low testosterone symptoms, particularly those dealing with andropause or menopause-related hormonal imbalances.
